description: A free, open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime environment.

option.name: --version
tip: U: -v, --version
Show the version.
Script read from stdin (default if no file name is provided, interactive mode if a tty)
Indicate the end of node options

global_option.name: --abort-on-uncaught-exception
tip: Aborting instead of exiting causes a core file to be generated for analysis

global_option.name: --allow-addons
tip: Allow use of addons when any permissions are set

global_option.name: --allow-child-process
tip: Allow use of child process when any permissions are set

global_option.name: --allow-ffi
tip: Allow use of FFI when any permissions are set

global_option.name: --allow-fs-read
tip: Allow permissions to read the filesystem

global_option.name: --allow-fs-write
tip: Allow permissions to write in the filesystem

global_option.name: --allow-inspector
tip: Allow use of inspector when any permissions are set

global_option.name: --allow-net
tip: Allow use of network when any permissions are set

global_option.name: --allow-wasi
tip: Allow wasi when any permissions are set

global_option.name: --allow-worker
tip: Allow worker threads when any permissions are set

global_option.name: --check
tip: U: -c, --check
Syntax check script without executing

global_option.name: --conditions
tip: U: -C, --conditions <value>
Additional user conditions for conditional exports and imports

global_option.name: --cpu-prof
tip: Start the V8 CPU profiler on start up, and write the CPU profile to disk before exit

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-dir
tip: Directory where the V8 profiles generated by --cpu-prof will be placed

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-interval
tip: Specified sampling interval in microseconds for the V8 CPU profile (default: 1000)

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-name
tip: Specified file name of the V8 profile generated with --cpu-prof

global_option.name: --diagnostic-dir
tip: Set dir for all output files (default: current working directory)

global_option.name: --disable-proto
tip: Disable Object.prototype.__proto__

global_option.name: --disable-sigusr1
tip: Disable inspector thread to be listening for SIGUSR1 signal

global_option.name: --disable-warning
tip: Silence specific process warnings

global_option.name: --disable-wasm-trap-handler
tip: Disable trap-handler-based WebAssembly bound checks

global_option.name: --disallow-code-generation-from-strings
tip: Disallow eval and friends

global_option.name: --dns-result-order
tip: Set default value of verbatim in dns.lookup

global_option.name: --enable-source-maps
tip: Source Map V3 support for stack traces

global_option.name: --entry-url
tip: Treat the entrypoint as a URL

global_option.name: --env-file
tip: Set environment variables from supplied file

global_option.name: --env-file-if-exists
tip: Set environment variables from supplied file if it exists

global_option.name: --eval
tip: U: -e, --eval <script>
Evaluate script

global_option.name: --experimental-eventsource
tip: Experimental EventSource API

global_option.name: --experimental-ffi
tip: Experimental node:ffi module

global_option.name: --experimental-import-meta-resolve
tip: Experimental ES Module import.meta.resolve() parentURL support

global_option.name: --experimental-loader
tip: Use the specified module as a custom loader

global_option.name: --experimental-network-inspection
tip: Experimental network inspection support

global_option.name: --experimental-sea-config
tip: Generate a blob that can be embedded into the single executable application

global_option.name: --experimental-storage-inspection
tip: Experimental storage inspection support

global_option.name: --experimental-stream-iter
tip: Experimental iterable streams API (node:stream/iter)

global_option.name: --experimental-test-coverage
tip: Enable code coverage in the test runner

global_option.name: --experimental-test-module-mocks
tip: Enable module mocking in the test runner

global_option.name: --experimental-test-tag-filter
tip: Run tests matching the given tag filter expression

global_option.name: --experimental-vm-modules
tip: Experimental ES Module support in vm module

global_option.name: --expose-gc
tip: Expose gc extension

global_option.name: --force-context-aware
tip: Disable loading non-context-aware addons

global_option.name: --force-fips
tip: Force FIPS crypto (cannot be disabled)

global_option.name: --frozen-intrinsics
tip: Experimental frozen intrinsics support

global_option.name: --heap-prof
tip: Start the V8 heap profiler on start up, and write the heap profile to disk before exit

global_option.name: --heap-prof-dir
tip: Directory where the V8 heap profiles generated by --heap-prof will be placed

global_option.name: --heap-prof-interval
tip: Specified sampling interval in bytes for the V8 heap profile (default: 512 * 1024)

global_option.name: --heap-prof-name
tip: Specified file name of the V8 heap profile generated with --heap-prof

global_option.name: --heapsnapshot-near-heap-limit
tip: Generate heap snapshots whenever V8 is approaching the heap limit

global_option.name: --heapsnapshot-signal
tip: Generate heap snapshot on specified signal

global_option.name: --help
tip: U: -h, --help
Show the help.

global_option.name: --import
tip: ES module to preload (option can be repeated)

global_option.name: --input-type
tip: Set module type for string input

global_option.name: --insecure-http-parser
tip: Use an insecure HTTP parser that accepts invalid HTTP headers

global_option.name: --inspect
tip: Activate inspector on host:port (default: 127.0.0.1:9229)

global_option.name: --inspect-brk
tip: Activate inspector on host:port and break at start of user script

global_option.name: --inspect-port
tip: Set host:port for inspector

global_option.name: --inspect-publish-uid
tip: Comma separated list of destinations for inspector uid (default: stderr,http)

global_option.name: --inspect-wait
tip: Activate inspector on host:port and wait for debugger to be attached

global_option.name: --interactive
tip: U: -i, --interactive
Always enter the REPL even if stdin does not appear to be a terminal

global_option.name: --jitless
tip: Disable runtime allocation of executable memory

global_option.name: --max-http-header-size
tip: Set the maximum size of HTTP headers (default: 16384 (16KB))

global_option.name: --no-addons
tip: Disable loading native addons

global_option.name: --no-deprecation
tip: Silence deprecation warnings

global_option.name: --no-experimental-detect-module
tip: When ambiguous modules fail to evaluate because they contain ES module syntax, try again to evaluate them as ES modules

global_option.name: --no-experimental-global-navigator
tip: Expose experimental Navigator API on the global scope

global_option.name: --no-experimental-repl-await
tip: Experimental await keyword support in REPL

global_option.name: --no-experimental-sqlite
tip: Experimental node:sqlite module

global_option.name: --no-experimental-websocket
tip: Experimental WebSocket API

global_option.name: --no-force-async-hooks-checks
tip: Disable checks for async_hooks

global_option.name: --no-global-search-paths
tip: Disable global module search paths

global_option.name: --no-warnings
tip: Silence all process warnings

global_option.name: --openssl-config
tip: Load OpenSSL configuration from the specified file (overrides OPENSSL_CONF)

global_option.name: --openssl-legacy-provider
tip: Enable OpenSSL 3.0 legacy provider

global_option.name: --openssl-shared-config
tip: Enable OpenSSL shared configuration

global_option.name: --pending-deprecation
tip: Emit pending deprecation warnings

global_option.name: --permission
tip: Enable the permission system

global_option.name: --permission-audit
tip: Enable audit only for the permission system

global_option.name: --preserve-symlinks
tip: Preserve symbolic links when resolving

global_option.name: --preserve-symlinks-main
tip: Preserve symbolic links when resolving the main module

global_option.name: --print
tip: U: -p, --print
Evaluate script and print result

global_option.name: --prof
tip: Generate V8 profiler output

global_option.name: --prof-process
tip: Process V8 profiler output generated using --prof

global_option.name: --redirect-warnings
tip: Write warnings to file instead of stderr

global_option.name: --report-compact
tip: Output compact single-line JSON

global_option.name: --report-directory
tip: Define custom report pathname (default: current working directory)

global_option.name: --report-filename
tip: Define custom report file name

global_option.name: --report-on-fatalerror
tip: Generate diagnostic report on fatal (internal) errors

global_option.name: --report-on-signal
tip: Generate diagnostic report upon receiving signals

global_option.name: --report-signal
tip: Causes diagnostic report to be produced on provided signal (default: SIGUSR2)

global_option.name: --report-uncaught-exception
tip: Generate diagnostic report on uncaught exceptions

global_option.name: --require
tip: U: -r, --require <module>
CommonJS module to preload (option can be repeated)

global_option.name: --run
tip: Run a script specified in package.json

global_option.name: --snapshot-blob
tip: Path to the snapshot blob that's either the result of snapshotbuilding, or the blob that is used to restore the application state

global_option.name: --test
tip: Launch test runner on startup

global_option.name: --test-concurrency
tip: Specify test runner concurrency

global_option.name: --test-force-exit
tip: Force test runner to exit upon completion

global_option.name: --test-name-pattern
tip: Run tests whose name matches this regular expression

global_option.name: --test-only
tip: Run tests with 'only' option set

global_option.name: --test-randomize
tip: Run tests in a random order

global_option.name: --test-reporter
tip: Report test output using the given reporter

global_option.name: --test-reporter-destination
tip: Report given reporter to the given destination

global_option.name: --test-shard
tip: Run test at specific shard

global_option.name: --test-timeout
tip: Specify test runner timeout

global_option.name: --test-update-snapshots
tip: Regenerate test snapshots

global_option.name: --throw-deprecation
tip: Throw an exception on deprecations

global_option.name: --title
tip: The process title to use on startup

global_option.name: --tls-cipher-list
tip: Use an alternative default TLS cipher list

global_option.name: --tls-keylog
tip: Log TLS decryption keys to named file for traffic analysis

global_option.name: --trace-deprecation
tip: Show stack traces on deprecations

global_option.name: --trace-env
tip: Print accesses to the environment variables

global_option.name: --trace-exit
tip: Show stack trace when an environment exits

global_option.name: --trace-promises
tip: Show stack traces on promise initialization and resolution

global_option.name: --trace-sigint
tip: Enable printing JavaScript stacktrace on SIGINT

global_option.name: --trace-sync-io
tip: Show stack trace when use of sync IO is detected after the first tick

global_option.name: --trace-tls
tip: Prints TLS packet trace information to stderr

global_option.name: --trace-uncaught
tip: Show stack traces for the throw behind uncaught exceptions

global_option.name: --trace-warnings
tip: Show stack traces on process warnings

global_option.name: --track-heap-objects
tip: Track heap object allocations for heap snapshots

global_option.name: --unhandled-rejections
tip: Define unhandled rejections behavior (strict|throw|warn|none|warn-with-error-code)

global_option.name: --use-bundled-ca
tip: Use bundled CA store (default)

global_option.name: --use-env-proxy
tip: Parse proxy settings from HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY/NO_PROXY environment variables

global_option.name: --use-largepages
tip: Map the Node.js static code to large pages (off|on|silent)

global_option.name: --use-openssl-ca
tip: Use OpenSSL's default CA store

global_option.name: --use-system-ca
tip: Use system's CA store

global_option.name: --v8-options
tip: Print V8 command line options

global_option.name: --v8-pool-size
tip: Set V8's thread pool size

global_option.name: --watch
tip: Run in watch mode

global_option.name: --watch-kill-signal
tip: Kill signal to send to the process on watch mode restarts (default: SIGTERM)

global_option.name: --watch-path
tip: Path to watch

global_option.name: --watch-preserve-output
tip: Preserve outputs on watch mode restart

global_option.name: --zero-fill-buffers
tip: Automatically zero-fill all newly allocated Buffer instances
